understanding.goal_understanding: Navigate a 2D tile grid to reach the goal gem marked `+`. The player must avoid landing on spike tiles (`u`/`v`) which cause immediate failure. The game is won by landing on or moving through the `+` tile.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is restricted to horizontal actions (MOVE_LEFT, MOVE_RIGHT). After any horizontal move, the player automatically falls in the current gravity direction (up or down depending on level orientation) until landing on a solid tile, hitting a hazard, or reaching the goal. CLICK removes breakable blocks (`x`) at a target position. Spikes cause instant loss. UNDO reverts the last action. Each level allows 2 attempts with 50 turns each. The `left_landing`/`right_landing` previews show where the player will end up after gravity acts on a move.
